chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-795 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 18.05.2022 This petition raises question regarding criminal negligence of professional doctors and in consequence whereof legal action against them is being sought in these proceedings under Article 199. We are afraid that in such cases involving professional negligence, ended up in petitioner’s daughter’s sad demise, writ is not a remedy. They however may initiate proceedings before a forum having jurisdiction under Sindh Healthcare Commission Act, 2013. Petitioner as such may exhaust his remedy available to him under the law. Petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
